type:
that sits inside a commented-out () block in cfgspawnabletypes.xml - it closes that comment early and breaks the file. The lines below contain no comment markers, so they're safe.
Host -> flares (theme): AmmoBox (Military) -> Red, Yellow, Dark FirstAidKit (Medic) -> Blue DryBag_Green / ChildBag_Green / CoyoteBag_Brown (Civilian) -> Green, White Drivable cars (trunk) -> Orange (vehicle-parts / construction flare)
Vehicle cargo: event-spawned cars receive cfgspawnabletypes in their trunk, so the flare ends up in the car's inventory. Add to each drivable car variant your map actually spawns. Skip any car that is commented out in your file. -->
